mapper.sql: college_id, college_code, college_name, dept_id, description, create_time, update_time, del_flag
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_college(college_code, college_name, dept_id, description, create_time, update_time, del_flag) values (#{collegeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{collegeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_college
college_code,
college_name,
dept_id,
description,
create_time,
update_time,
del_flag,
#{collegeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{collegeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

mapper.update:
update biz_college
college_code = #{collegeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
college_name = #{collegeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
where college_id = #{collegeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update biz_college set college_code = #{collegeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, college_name = #{collegeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} where college_id = #{collegeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
